name: IdsEdwAplCatHistDLoad

text.value: WITH cte_update AS (UPDATE T SET T.SRC_SYS_CD=S.SRC_SYS_CD,T.APL_ID=S.APL_ID,T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK=S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,T.EDW_CUR_RCRD_IN=S.EDW_CUR_RCRD_IN,T.EDW_RCRD_END_DT_SK=S.EDW_RCRD_END_DT_SK,T.APL_CAT_CD=S.APL_CAT_CD,T.APL_CAT_NM=S.APL_CAT_NM,T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK=S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.APL_CAT_HIST_D AS T JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.ABC_TMP_IdsEdwAplCatHistDLoad AS S ON T.APL_SK=S.APL_SK AND T.EDW_RCRD_STRT_DT_SK=S.EDW_RCRD_STRT_DT_SK), cte_insert AS (INSERT INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.APL_CAT_HIST_D(APL_SK,EDW_RCRD_STRT_DT_SK,SRC_SYS_CD,APL_ID,CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,EDW_CUR_RCRD_IN,EDW_RCRD_END_DT_SK,APL_CAT_CD,APL_CAT_NM,CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK) SELECT S.APL_SK,S.EDW_RCRD_STRT_DT_SK,S.SRC_SYS_CD,S.APL_ID,S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,S.EDW_CUR_RCRD_IN,S.EDW_RCRD_END_DT_SK,S.APL_CAT_CD,S.APL_CAT_NM,S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.ABC_TMP_IdsEdwAplCatHistDLoad AS S LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.APL_CAT_HIST_D AS T ON T.APL_SK=S.APL_SK AND T.EDW_RCRD_STRT_DT_SK=S.EDW_RCRD_STRT_DT_SK WHERE T.APL_SK IS NULL) SELECT 1
